messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I need some help with my recent orders and my account info. I just moved to a new house on Elm Avenue here in Houston, and I noticed that one of my orders is still being sent to my old address. I’d like to update the shipping address for that order to my new place, and also make sure my default address is changed to the new one for future orders. Can you help with that?
